SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:12am
Judge Pro Tem Michael Raifsnider, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Angel L. Salinas present in pro per, Defendant from Small Claims matter Franciso Vall present with attorney Jennifer A. Phillips SB # 201156 (defendant was previously dismissed). Respondent, Carolyn A. Goeldner present with attorney Daniel Bornstein SB 169159. JPT instructs re knowing Respondent's counsel, no objection by any party re JPT's ability to remain impartial. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Michael Raifsnider

EXA2: 5 photos (Salinas)
